prompt: A stylized 3D low-poly cartoon scene of a skinny disheveled young man slouching in a plush blue armchair in a wood-paneled room, viewed in a medium-wide shot from slightly below table height. He has messy dark brown dreadlock-like hair, pale skin, droopy half-lidded eyes, and a huge open mouth showing uneven white teeth, with an exaggerated goofy expression. His pose is loose and lazy: one leg stretched far out and resting on the coffee table, the other bent up on the chair, one hand holding a small smoking item near his face with a tiny red ember, the other hand holding a gray remote control. He wears a royal blue T-shirt, mustard yellow shorts, long white socks, and oversized red slide sandals. In front of him is a rectangular wooden coffee table with 3 clearly visible items on top: a pile of bright green buds at the center front, 1 folded white paper beside the pile, and 1 round gray ashtray with dark ash near the right side. The room is simple and warm-toned with vertical wooden wall panels, a dark wood floor, soft indoor lighting, and a small cropped section of framed wall decor in the upper right corner. The overall look is humorous, rough-edged, and handcrafted, like an indie animated sitcom made from painted paper-cutout or low-poly clay textures, with muted shadows, slightly worn surfaces, and a casual stoner-lounge vibe.
